items.title_en: Nexstar says it will appeal following U.S. judge ruling halting Tegna merger
items.title_zh: Nexstar 表示将在美国法官裁定停止 Tegna 合并后提起上诉
items.desc_en: Nexstar will appeal a judge's ruling halting its acquisition of rival broadcaster Tegna, as ​antitrust challenges from DirecTV ​and a group of states proceed.
items.desc_zh: 随着来自 DirecTV 和一些州的反垄断挑战的继续，Nexstar 将就法官停止收购竞争对手广播公司 Tegna 的裁决提出上诉。

items.title_en: U.S. renews Russian oil waiver after pressure from countries dealing with Iran war price shocks

items.desc_en: Lawmakers accused the government of going easy on Moscow as its war on Ukraine grinds on.
items.desc_zh: 立法者指责政府在乌克兰战争持续进行之际对莫斯科采取宽松态度。

items.title_en: DR Congo accepts first set of deportees from the US

items.desc_en: The Congolese government stresses those expelled from the US are only in the country temporarily.
items.desc_zh: 刚果政府强调，那些被美国驱逐的人只是暂时留在该国。

items.title_en: We spoke to over 30 central bankers, policymakers and politicians. Here are their top concerns

items.title_en: Japan reveals new name for 40C-and-hotter days after blistering summer
items.title_zh: 日本公布了酷暑过后 40 摄氏度及更热天气的新名称
items.desc_en: The term - kokushobi - translates to "cruelly hot", "brutally hot" or "severely hot", and comes after Japan's hottest summer on record.
items.desc_zh: “kokushobi”这个词的意思是“酷热”、“酷热”或“酷热”，是在日本有记录以来最热的夏季之后出现的。

items.desc_en: Bellarmine Mugabe was arrested in February following the shooting of a 23-year-old man at his home in Johannesburg.
items.desc_zh: 贝拉明·穆加贝 (Bellarmine Mugabe) 于 2 月份在约翰内斯堡的家中枪击一名 23 岁男子后被捕。

items.title_en: Palestinians hand over suspect in 1982 attack on Jewish restaurant in Paris
items.title_zh: 巴勒斯坦人移交 1982 年巴黎犹太餐厅袭击案嫌疑人
items.desc_en: Hicham Harb is suspected of directing the attack in the Rue des Rosiers and acting as one of the gunmen who shot at diners.
items.desc_zh: 希查姆·哈布 (Hicham Harb) 涉嫌指挥了玫瑰街的袭击，并且是向食客开枪的枪手之一。

items.desc_zh: 这次搜寻过程一波三折，牵动着韩国的心，甚至还引发了一种迷因币的诞生。

items.desc_zh: 由于他们的足球队在比赛中没有唱国歌，两人寻求庇护。

items.desc_zh: Meta 和 YouTube 等公司的高管将被问到他们正在采取哪些措施来保护儿童。

items.title_en: Booking.com customers warned of 'reservation hijacking' after hack
items.title_zh: Booking.com 客户被黑客攻击后收到“预订劫持”警告
items.desc_en: The travel platform said it had changed Pins to protect customers but would not say how many were affected.
items.desc_zh: 该旅游平台表示，它已更改 Pin 图以保护客户，但未透露有多少人受到影响。

items.title_en: Google to punish sites that trap people in with back button tricks
items.title_zh: 谷歌将惩罚利用后退按钮欺骗用户的网站
items.desc_en: The tech giant said it will punish sites that block back button navigation from June.
items.desc_zh: 这家科技巨头表示，将从 6 月份开始惩罚屏蔽后退按钮导航的网站。

items.title_en: Man charged with attempted murder in attack on home of OpenAI's Sam Altman
items.title_zh: 一名男子被指控在袭击 OpenAI 萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 家时企图谋杀
items.desc_en: The Texas man, who also faces federal felony charges, allegedly had documents advocating for violence against AI executives.
items.desc_zh: 这名德克萨斯州男子还面临联邦重罪指控，据称他持有鼓吹对人工智能高管实施暴力的文件。

items.title_en: Roblox defends expanded age‑checks after parents raise concerns over errors
items.title_zh: 在家长对错误表示担忧后，Roblox 为扩大年龄检查辩护
items.desc_en: With 144m daily users, the gaming company is extending its tech to introduce two age‑specific accounts.
items.desc_zh: 该游戏公司拥有 1.44 亿每日用户，正在扩展其技术，推出两个特定年龄的帐户。

items.title_zh: GTA 制作商 Rockstar Games 再次遭到黑客攻击，但淡化影响
items.desc_en: The incident marks the second time the games giant has been hacked by young, English-speaking hackers.
items.desc_zh: 此次事件标志着这家游戏巨头第二次遭到年轻的英语黑客的攻击。
